description: Pair-level plagiarism labels for C++ exercise submissions

blatancy_levels.1: subtle — local renames, include reorder, endl swap
blatancy_levels.2: moderate — using-directives, emplace/push swap, brace style
blatancy_levels.3: blatant — extra renames, spacing tweaks, comment marker
blatancy_levels.4: very_blatant — minimal edits, include reorder, light renames
